name: Create Patient Rollback On Invalid Identifier

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {'error': {'message': 'Invalid Submission', 'code': 'webservices.rest.error.invalid.submission', 'globalErrors': [{'code': 'PatientIdentifier.error.nullOrBlank', 'message': 'Identifier cannot be null or blank'}], 'fieldErrors': {}}}

parameters.name: model
parameters.value: CreatePatientRequest(identifiers=[PatientIdentifierRequest(identifier='', identifierType='05a29f94-c0ed-11e2-94be-8c13b969e334', location='1ce1b7d4-c865-4178-82b0-5932e51503d6', preferred=True)], person=PatientPerson(gender='23e89f17', birthdate='1976-01-02', names=[PatientName(givenName='b246153c', familyName='6ccdd737')], addresses=[PatientAddress(address1='10ff2134', cityVillage='3bffa286', country='b637fb1f', postalCode='39fd7ec6')]))
